scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/timeoff-service run build && npm --prefix apps/mock-hcm run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix apps/timeoff-service test && npm --prefix apps/mock-hcm test
scripts.test:e2e: npm --prefix apps/timeoff-service run test:e2e && npm --prefix apps/mock-hcm run test:e2e
scripts.export:openapi: npm --prefix apps/timeoff-service run export:openapi && npm --prefix apps/mock-hcm run export:openapi
scripts.prisma:migrate: npm --prefix apps/timeoff-service exec prisma migrate dev
